title: Personal Portfolio Site
description: Build a sleek personal portfolio website with an about section, project showcase, and contact form. Use CSS animations for smooth transitions.
vibePrompt: I want to build a personal portfolio website with dark mode, smooth scroll navigation, a hero section, an animated project grid, and a contact form using HTML, CSS, and vanilla JS. Start by creating a plan with the file structure, components, and design approach. Then implement it.

title: Weather Dashboard
description: Create a weather dashboard that fetches real-time weather data from an API and displays forecasts with beautiful charts and icons.
vibePrompt: I want to build a weather dashboard web app that uses the OpenWeatherMap API. It should show current weather, a 5-day forecast with icons, and a temperature chart. Include a city search bar and make it responsive and colorful. Plan the component structure and API integration first, then build it out.

title: Terminal Todo App
description: Build a command-line todo list manager with add, complete, delete, and list features. Store data in a local JSON file.
vibePrompt: I want to build a CLI todo app in Node.js with commands for add, list, complete, and delete. Todos should be stored in a JSON file, with colored output and a progress bar showing completion percentage. Plan the command structure and data model first, then implement everything.

title: Live Markdown Previewer
description: A split-pane editor where you type Markdown on the left and see rendered HTML on the right, updating in real time.
vibePrompt: I want to build a live Markdown previewer with a split-pane layout — a textarea for Markdown input on the left and rendered HTML preview on the right, updating in real time. Include syntax highlighting and a copy HTML button. Plan the layout and rendering approach, then implement it.

title: REST API with Express
description: Build a REST API for a bookstore with CRUD operations, input validation, and error handling using Express.js.
vibePrompt: I want to build a REST API for a bookstore using Express.js and TypeScript with CRUD endpoints for books (title, author, ISBN, price). It should include input validation, error handling middleware, and Swagger documentation. Plan the project structure, routes, and data model first, then implement the full API.

title: Classic Snake Game
description: Recreate the classic Snake game in the browser using HTML Canvas. Add score tracking, speed increases, and game-over screen.
vibePrompt: I want to build a classic Snake game using HTML Canvas and JavaScript with arrow key controls, score display, increasing speed as the snake grows, collision detection, and a game-over screen with a restart button. Plan the game loop, rendering, and state management approach first, then build it.

title: Pomodoro Timer
description: A productivity timer that alternates between 25-minute work sessions and 5-minute breaks with notifications and session tracking.
vibePrompt: I want to build a Pomodoro timer web app with 25-minute work and 5-minute break cycles. It should have start/pause/reset buttons, a circular progress animation, browser notifications when time is up, and a session counter. Plan the timer logic and UI components, then implement everything.

title: Interactive Quiz App
description: Build a trivia quiz app that fetches questions from an API, shows multiple-choice options, tracks score, and displays results.
vibePrompt: I want to build an interactive quiz app that fetches questions from the Open Trivia Database API. It should show one question at a time with multiple-choice answers, a progress bar, score tracking, and an animated results page at the end. Plan the quiz flow and state management, then build it.

title: Expense Tracker
description: A personal finance app to log expenses, categorize them, and visualize spending patterns with charts.
vibePrompt: I want to build an expense tracker web app where users can add expenses with amount, category, and date. It should show a pie chart of spending by category, a bar chart of daily spending, store data in localStorage, and include a monthly summary. Plan the data model, chart components, and UI layout first, then implement it.

title: AI Chatbot Interface
description: Build a chat interface that connects to an AI API. Features include message history, typing indicators, and a slick UI.
vibePrompt: I want to build a ChatGPT-style chat interface with message bubbles for user and AI messages, a typing indicator animation, message timestamps, a clear chat button, and a dark theme. It should connect to an AI API for responses. Plan the message handling architecture and UI components, then implement the full chat experience.

title: GitHub Profile Viewer
description: An app that fetches a GitHub user's profile, repos, and contribution stats, displaying them in a beautiful dashboard.
vibePrompt: I want to build a GitHub profile viewer that takes a username and displays their avatar, bio, follower count, top repositories sorted by stars, and a language breakdown — styled like a developer trading card. Plan the GitHub API integration and card layout, then build it.

title: File Organizer CLI
description: A CLI tool that scans a directory and automatically organizes files into folders based on their file type.
vibePrompt: I want to build a CLI file organizer in Node.js that scans a given directory and moves files into subfolders by type (Images, Documents, Videos, Code, etc.). Include a dry-run mode and colored output. Plan the file categorization rules and CLI interface, then implement it.

title: Habit Tracker with Streaks
description: Track daily habits with a GitHub-style contribution heatmap showing streaks and completion rates.
vibePrompt: I want to build a habit tracker web app where users can add habits and check them off daily. It should display a GitHub-style green contribution heatmap for each habit, show current streak, longest streak, and completion rate, and store data in localStorage. Plan the data model, heatmap rendering, and UI layout, then build it.

title: ASCII Art Generator
description: Convert images or text into ASCII art. Support different character sets and output sizes.
vibePrompt: I want to build a web app that converts uploaded images into ASCII art. Users should be able to choose character density, output width, and whether to use color. Include a text-to-ASCII-art mode with big block letters and add copy and download buttons. Plan the image processing pipeline and character mapping algorithm, then implement it.

title: Color Palette Generator
description: Generate harmonious color palettes with copy-to-clipboard hex codes, palette locking, and export features.
vibePrompt: I want to build a color palette generator like Coolors where pressing spacebar generates 5 random harmonious colors. Users can lock a color, see hex/RGB/HSL values, copy individual colors, and export the palette as an image. Plan the color harmony algorithm and UI interactions, then build it.

title: Recipe Search API
description: Build an API that lets users search for recipes by ingredients, cuisine, or dietary preferences.
vibePrompt: I want to build a REST API for recipe search using Express.js, seeded with 20 recipes. It should support search by ingredients (comma-separated), filtering by cuisine type and dietary restrictions (vegan, gluten-free), and include pagination with cooking time and difficulty level in results. Plan the data schema, seed data, and API endpoints first, then implement the full API.

title: Memory Card Game
description: A card-matching memory game with flip animations, move counter, timer, and difficulty levels.
vibePrompt: I want to build a memory card matching game with 3D CSS flip animations, a move counter, timer, and 3 difficulty levels (4x3, 4x4, 6x4 grids). Use emoji as card faces and include a victory screen with stats and a play-again button. Plan the game state management and animation approach, then build the complete game.

title: URL Shortener
description: Build a URL shortening service with custom slugs, click tracking, and an analytics dashboard.
vibePrompt: I want to build a URL shortener with Express.js and SQLite. Users can shorten URLs with optional custom slugs, and the app tracks click count and last accessed time. Include a dashboard showing all shortened URLs with stats and QR code generation for each short URL. Plan the database schema, API routes, and dashboard UI, then implement everything.

title: Generative Art Canvas
description: Create mesmerizing generative art using algorithms. Build interactive patterns with user controls for colors, shapes, and speed.
vibePrompt: I want to build a generative art web app using HTML Canvas with flowing particle systems that respond to mouse movement. Include controls for particle count, color scheme, trail length, and speed, plus a save-as-PNG button. Plan the particle physics system and rendering pipeline, then implement the full interactive experience.

title: Typing Speed Test
description: A typing speed test app that measures WPM and accuracy, with different text difficulty levels.
vibePrompt: I want to build a typing speed test app like MonkeyType that shows a paragraph, highlights the current word, and tracks WPM and accuracy in real time. Include 15s/30s/60s modes, a results screen with a WPM chart, and a dark mode theme. Plan the text rendering, input tracking, and scoring system, then build it.

title: JSON Formatter & Validator
description: A tool that formats, validates, and visualizes JSON with syntax highlighting and tree view.
vibePrompt: I want to build a JSON formatter and validator web app. Users paste JSON on the left and see formatted output with syntax highlighting on the right. Include a tree view toggle, validation error messages with line numbers, minify/beautify buttons, and a dark code editor theme. Plan the parser, formatter, and tree view components, then implement it.

title: Audio Music Visualizer
description: Build a music visualizer that reacts to audio input with colorful bars, waveforms, and particle effects.
vibePrompt: I want to build a music visualizer using the Web Audio API and Canvas that analyzes audio from a file upload or microphone input. It should show frequency bars, a waveform, and floating particles that react to the beat, with controls for visualization style and color scheme. Plan the audio analysis pipeline and rendering system, then build the full visualizer.

title: Real-Time Polling App
description: Create live polls where multiple users can vote and see results update in real time using WebSockets.
vibePrompt: I want to build a real-time polling app where users create polls with multiple options, others vote, and results animate in real time using WebSockets. Show results as animated bar charts with percentages and include shareable poll links. Plan the WebSocket architecture, server-side logic, and client UI, then implement the full stack.

title: Git Stats CLI Tool
description: A CLI that analyzes a git repository and shows contribution stats, commit frequency, and code churn.
vibePrompt: I want to build a CLI tool that analyzes a git repository and shows top contributors, commits per day/week as ASCII bar charts, most modified files, average commit size, and a code churn heatmap — all with colored terminal output. Plan the git data extraction and visualization approach, then implement the full CLI tool.

title: Pixel Art Editor
description: A browser-based pixel art editor with drawing tools, color picker, layers, and export to PNG.
vibePrompt: I want to build a browser-based pixel art editor with a configurable grid (8x8 to 64x64), color picker, pencil/eraser/fill tools, undo/redo, export to PNG, a palette of 16 default colors, and save/load to localStorage. Plan the canvas rendering, tool system, and project persistence, then build the complete editor.

title: Kanban Task Board
description: A drag-and-drop Kanban board with columns for todo, in progress, and done. Add, edit, and reorder tasks.
vibePrompt: I want to build a Kanban task board with drag-and-drop across three columns: Todo, In Progress, and Done. Users can add cards with title and description, drag them between columns, and reorder within columns with smooth animations. Store state in localStorage. Plan the drag-and-drop system and data model, then implement it.

title: API Health Monitor
description: A dashboard that periodically checks multiple API endpoints and displays their status, response time, and uptime.
vibePrompt: I want to build an API health monitoring dashboard that checks multiple configured endpoints and shows status (up/down), response time, and uptime percentage. It should auto-refresh every 30 seconds, include a timeline graph of response times, and support email/webhook alert configuration. Plan the monitoring engine, data storage, and dashboard UI, then build the full system.

title: Instagram-Style Image Filters
description: Apply Instagram-style filters to images using Canvas. Include preset filters and custom adjustments.
vibePrompt: I want to build an image filter app where users upload a photo and apply Instagram-style filters (grayscale, sepia, vintage, warm, cool), with sliders for brightness, contrast, saturation, and blur. Include a before/after comparison and a download button. Plan the Canvas-based image processing pipeline and filter algorithms, then implement it.

title: Text Adventure Game Engine
description: Build an interactive text adventure game engine where players make choices that affect the story outcome.
vibePrompt: I want to build a text adventure game engine in the browser. Stories are defined as JSON with rooms, items, and choices. The engine should display narrative text with a typewriter effect, present choice buttons, track inventory, and support multiple endings. Include a sample adventure to demo it. Plan the game engine architecture and story data format, then build everything.

title: Regex Tester & Visualizer
description: A tool for testing regular expressions with live matching, group highlighting, and a visual explanation of the pattern.
vibePrompt: I want to build a regex tester tool with an input field for patterns and a textarea for test text. It should highlight all matches in real time with different colors for capture groups, show match details (index, groups), and include common regex presets and a cheat sheet sidebar. Plan the regex engine integration and highlight system, then implement the full tool.

title: Secure Password Generator
description: Generate strong passwords with configurable length, character types, and strength indicator.
vibePrompt: I want to build a password generator web app with configurable length (8-128), toggles for uppercase/lowercase/numbers/symbols, a strength meter with color indicator, one-click copy, bulk generate mode (10 at once), and a passphrase mode for memorable word-based passwords. Plan the generation algorithms and UI layout, then build it.

title: CSV Data Analyzer
description: Upload a CSV file and get instant statistics, charts, and data previews without any setup.
vibePrompt: I want to build a CSV analyzer web app with drag-and-drop upload. It should show a data table preview, column statistics (min, max, mean, median for numbers), value frequency counts, and auto-generated charts (histograms for numbers, bar charts for categories) — all processed client-side. Plan the parsing engine, statistics calculations, and chart components, then implement it.

title: NPM Package Scaffolder
description: A CLI tool that scaffolds a new npm package with TypeScript, testing, linting, and CI/CD config.
vibePrompt: I want to build an interactive CLI that scaffolds a new npm package. It should ask for package name, description, and features (TypeScript, Jest, ESLint, GitHub Actions CI), then generate package.json, tsconfig, test setup, README with badges, .gitignore, and a sample source file with colored output. Plan the template system and interactive prompt flow, then implement the full scaffolder.

title: Tetris Clone
description: Build a playable Tetris game with all standard pieces, rotation, line clearing, scoring, and levels.
vibePrompt: I want to build a Tetris clone using HTML Canvas with all 7 tetromino shapes, proper rotation, ghost piece preview, next piece display, line clearing with animation, scoring, level progression with speed increase, and game-over detection. Include keyboard controls and high score saved to localStorage. Plan the game engine, piece rotation system, and collision detection, then build the complete game.

title: Markdown Note-Taking App
description: A note-taking app with Markdown support, folder organization, search, and local storage.
vibePrompt: I want to build a note-taking web app like a mini Notion with Markdown support, folder organization, full-text search, and auto-save to localStorage. Use a sidebar for navigation and a main content area with a Markdown editor showing a live preview. Plan the data model, folder hierarchy, search indexing, and editor components, then implement everything.

title: API Mock Server Generator
description: A tool that generates a mock API server from a JSON schema or OpenAPI spec for frontend development.
vibePrompt: I want to build a CLI tool that takes a JSON file defining endpoints and generates a working Express mock server with GET/POST/PUT/DELETE support, configurable response delays, random data generation using Faker.js, and CORS enabled by default. Include a web UI to view and edit mock responses on the fly. Plan the endpoint parsing, mock data generation, and web UI architecture, then build it all.

title: Landing Page Generator
description: An AI-powered tool that generates a complete landing page from a text description of the product.
vibePrompt: I want to build a landing page generator where users enter a product name and description, and it generates a complete responsive landing page with hero section, features grid, testimonials, pricing table, and CTA. Users can pick a color scheme, see a live preview, and download as HTML. Plan the template engine, section components, and theming system, then implement the full generator.

title: 2D Platformer Game
description: Build a simple 2D platformer with a character that can run, jump, and collect coins across levels.
vibePrompt: I want to build a 2D platformer game using HTML Canvas with a character that can run and jump across platforms, collectible coins, a score display, simple enemy AI, and 3 levels of increasing difficulty with sound effects. Plan the physics engine, level design system, sprite management, and collision detection, then build the complete game.

title: Data Pipeline CLI
description: A CLI tool that chains data transformations: read CSV → filter → transform → output JSON/chart.
vibePrompt: I want to build a data pipeline CLI in Node.js that reads CSV files and applies transformations via flags: --filter, --sort, --select, --groupby. It should output as a formatted table, JSON, or CSV, and include a --chart flag for ASCII bar charts in the terminal. Plan the transformation pipeline architecture and output formatters, then implement the full CLI.

title: Tab Manager Browser Extension
description: A browser extension that groups, saves, and restores tab sessions for better tab management.
vibePrompt: I want to build a Chrome browser extension for tab management with features to view all open tabs in a popup, group tabs by domain, save and restore tab sessions by name, close duplicate tabs, and search across all tabs with a clean popup UI. Plan the Chrome extension architecture, manifest, and storage strategy, then build the complete extension.

title: Event Countdown Timer
description: A beautiful countdown timer to a future event with animated flipping number cards.
vibePrompt: I want to build an event countdown timer web app where users enter an event name and date, and see a beautiful countdown with flipping number cards (days, hours, minutes, seconds). Include confetti animation at zero, support for multiple events, and shareable countdown links. Plan the flip animation system and event management, then implement it.

title: GraphQL API for Movies
description: Build a GraphQL API for a movie database with queries, mutations, and relationships between movies, actors, and directors.
vibePrompt: I want to build a GraphQL API for a movie database using Apollo Server with types for Movie, Actor, and Director including relationships, queries for listing and searching movies, mutations for adding reviews, seed data for 10 movies, and filtering by genre and year. Plan the schema design, resolvers, and data layer, then implement the full API.

title: Code Screenshot Tool
description: A tool that turns code snippets into beautiful, shareable images with syntax highlighting and themes.
vibePrompt: I want to build a code-to-image tool like Carbon where users paste code with syntax highlighting and choose from themes (dracula, monokai, github, etc.), background color/gradient, window chrome style, font size, and padding, then export as PNG. Support 10+ programming languages. Plan the rendering pipeline, theme system, and export functionality, then build it.

title: Fitness Workout Logger
description: A mobile-friendly web app to log workouts, track progress, and visualize exercise stats over time.
vibePrompt: I want to build a mobile-first fitness workout logger where users can create workout templates (exercises, sets, reps, weight), log completed workouts, view progress charts over time, and use a rest period timer between sets. Store data in localStorage and use a bottom navigation bar. Plan the data model, workout flow, and chart components, then implement the full app.

title: Emoji Search Engine
description: A fast emoji search tool with keyword search, categories, skin tone modifiers, and one-click copy.
vibePrompt: I want to build a fast emoji search engine that loads all Unicode emojis with metadata. Include instant keyword search, category filters, a skin tone selector, a recently used section, and one-click copy to clipboard with emoji name and Unicode shown on hover. Plan the emoji data loading, search indexing, and virtual scrolling for performance, then build it.

title: Terminal Dashboard
description: A real-time terminal dashboard showing system stats like CPU, memory, disk, and network usage.
vibePrompt: I want to build a real-time terminal dashboard using blessed or ink (React for CLI) that shows CPU usage bar, memory usage pie chart, disk space, network throughput, top processes, and system uptime — auto-refreshing every second with colors and Unicode box-drawing characters. Plan the data collection layer, widget layout system, and refresh cycle, then implement the full dashboard.

title: Collaborative Drawing Canvas
description: A real-time collaborative drawing app where multiple users can draw on the same canvas simultaneously.
vibePrompt: I want to build a collaborative drawing canvas where multiple users can draw on the same canvas in real time using WebSockets. Include tools for pencil, eraser, shapes (rectangle, circle), color picker, line thickness slider, show other users' cursors with names, and add undo and clear canvas options. Plan the WebSocket sync protocol, drawing engine, and tool system, then build the full collaborative app.

title: My First Website
description: Create your very own website about yourself! Add your name, favorite things, photos, and fun colors.
vibePrompt: I want to build my very first website about me. It should have my name in big letters, a section about my favorite animals, foods, and hobbies, a colorful background, and fun emoji decorations. Make it bright and cheerful! Plan the design and layout first, then build it.

title: Joke Generator
description: A fun app that shows a random joke every time you click a button. Laugh out loud!
vibePrompt: I want to build a fun joke generator app. When I click a big colorful button, it shows a random funny joke with a punchline reveal. Add silly sound effects, laughing emoji animations, and a 'Tell Another' button. Make it look playful and colorful! Plan the design and layout first, then build it.

title: Virtual Pet
description: Take care of a cute virtual pet! Feed it, play with it, and keep it happy. Watch its mood change.
vibePrompt: I want to build a virtual pet app with a cute animal character on screen. I can feed it, play with it, and put it to sleep using buttons. The pet should show different emotions (happy, hungry, sleepy, playful) with fun animations. Add a happiness meter and a name input. Plan the design and layout first, then build it.

title: Birthday Card Maker
description: Design a beautiful digital birthday card with custom text, colors, stickers, and confetti animations.
vibePrompt: I want to build a birthday card maker where I can type a person's name and a birthday message, pick fun backgrounds and colors, add sticker decorations like balloons and cake, and see confetti animations. Add a 'Print' button so I can give it to someone. Plan the design and layout first, then build it.

title: Silly Story Generator
description: Create hilarious stories by filling in words! Like Mad Libs — type nouns, verbs, and adjectives to make funny tales.
vibePrompt: I want to build a silly story generator like Mad Libs. The app asks me to type words like a noun, a verb, an adjective, and a name, then puts them into a funny story template. Show the finished story with the filled-in words highlighted in a different color. Include at least 5 different story templates. Plan the design and layout first, then build it.

title: Math Quiz Game
description: Test your math skills! Answer addition, subtraction, and multiplication questions to score points and earn stars.
vibePrompt: I want to build a fun math quiz game. It shows a math problem (addition, subtraction, or multiplication) and I type the answer. If I get it right, I earn a star and hear a happy sound. If wrong, it shows the correct answer. Add a score counter, a timer, and difficulty levels (easy, medium, hard). Make it colorful and fun! Plan the design and layout first, then build it.

title: Choose Your Own Adventure
description: An interactive story where YOU make the choices! Different paths lead to different endings.
vibePrompt: I want to build a choose-your-own-adventure story game. The app shows a story paragraph and gives me two or three choices to pick what happens next. Different choices lead to different parts of the story with different endings. Add fun pictures or emoji for each scene. Include at least 3 possible endings. Plan the design and layout first, then build it.

title: Animal Sound Quiz
description: Can you match the animal to its sound? A fun quiz game with animal pictures and sound effects.
vibePrompt: I want to build an animal sound quiz game. The app shows a picture of an animal and plays its sound, then I pick the correct animal name from multiple choices. Add a score tracker, fun animations when I get it right, and at least 10 different animals. Make it bright and colorful with big buttons! Plan the design and layout first, then build it.

title: Digital Lemonade Stand
description: Run your own lemonade stand! Set prices, buy supplies, and try to make the most money.
vibePrompt: I want to build a digital lemonade stand game. I start with some money and buy lemons and sugar. I set my lemonade price, and customers come to buy. The weather changes each day and affects how many customers come. I need to make a profit! Show my earnings, supplies, and a daily summary. Plan the design and layout first, then build it.

title: My Drawing App
description: A simple and colorful drawing app! Pick colors, change brush sizes, and create your own art masterpiece.
vibePrompt: I want to build a simple drawing app for kids. It should have a big white canvas, a row of bright color buttons to pick from, a slider to change brush size, an eraser, a clear button, and a save button to download my drawing. Make the buttons big and easy to click! Plan the design and layout first, then build it.

title: Pitch Deck Generator
description: Generate a professional pitch deck by answering a few questions about your business idea, market, and goals.
vibePrompt: I want to build a pitch deck generator for business presentations. The user answers questions about their company name, problem statement, solution, target market, business model, and team. The app generates a structured pitch deck with sections for each slide, professional styling, and a downloadable format. Plan the design and layout first, then build it.

title: Meeting Agenda Builder
description: Create structured meeting agendas with topics, time allocations, presenters, and shareable output.
vibePrompt: I want to build a meeting agenda builder. Users add a meeting title, date, and attendees, then create agenda items with topic, presenter, time allocation, and notes. The app shows total meeting time, warns if it exceeds the scheduled slot, and can export the agenda as a printable page or email-friendly format. Plan the design and layout first, then build it.

title: Project Status Dashboard
description: A visual dashboard to track project progress, milestones, team assignments, and deadlines at a glance.
vibePrompt: I want to build a project status dashboard. Users create projects with milestones, deadlines, and team member assignments. The dashboard shows progress bars, upcoming deadlines, a timeline view, and status indicators (on track, at risk, behind). Include a summary card with overall project health. Plan the design and layout first, then build it.

title: Customer Feedback Form
description: A professional customer feedback form with star ratings, categories, and a results summary dashboard.
vibePrompt: I want to build a customer feedback form and results dashboard. The form collects customer name, email, star rating (1-5), feedback category (product, service, support, other), and comments. The dashboard shows average rating, feedback count by category as a pie chart, recent feedback list, and trends over time. Plan the design and layout first, then build it.

title: Invoice Template Generator
description: Create professional invoices with line items, tax calculations, and downloadable PDF output.
vibePrompt: I want to build an invoice generator. Users enter their business name, client details, and add line items with description, quantity, and unit price. The app calculates subtotals, applies tax, shows a grand total, and displays it as a professional invoice with a printable layout. Include invoice numbering and a due date field. Plan the design and layout first, then build it.

title: Team Directory
description: A searchable team directory with photos, roles, departments, and contact info for your organization.
vibePrompt: I want to build a team directory web app. Each team member has a card showing their name, photo, role, department, email, and phone. Include search by name or role, filter by department, and a grid/list view toggle. Add a quick contact button and an org chart view option. Plan the design and layout first, then build it.

title: OKR Tracker
description: Track Objectives and Key Results for your team. Set goals, measure progress, and align on priorities.
vibePrompt: I want to build an OKR (Objectives and Key Results) tracker. Users create objectives with key results that have target values and current progress. The app shows progress bars for each key result, overall objective completion percentage, and a team summary view. Include quarterly views and status labels (on track, behind, at risk). Plan the design and layout first, then build it.

title: Competitive Analysis Dashboard
description: Compare your business against competitors across key metrics with visual comparison charts.
vibePrompt: I want to build a competitive analysis dashboard. Users enter their company and competitors with data like pricing, features, market share, and ratings. The app displays comparison tables, radar charts for feature comparison, and a SWOT analysis template. Include the ability to add notes and highlight differentiators. Plan the design and layout first, then build it.

title: Email Template Builder
description: Design professional email templates with drag-and-drop blocks, preview, and copy-ready HTML output.
vibePrompt: I want to build an email template builder. Users pick a template type (welcome, newsletter, announcement, follow-up), customize the header, body sections, call-to-action button, and footer. Include a live preview, color scheme picker, and a button to copy the final HTML. Pre-load with 5 professional templates. Plan the design and layout first, then build it.

title: Social Media Content Planner
description: Plan and schedule social media posts across platforms with a calendar view and content previews.
vibePrompt: I want to build a social media content planner. Users create posts with text, select a platform (Twitter, LinkedIn, Instagram), pick a date and time, and add hashtags. Show a monthly calendar view with posts color-coded by platform, a weekly agenda view, and post character count warnings. Include a content ideas bank section. Plan the design and layout first, then build it.

title: Study Timer with Stats
description: A smart study timer that tracks your study sessions, subjects, and shows weekly study statistics.
vibePrompt: I want to build a study timer app. I select a subject, start a timer, and it logs my study session. The app shows total time studied today and this week, a breakdown by subject as a bar chart, and a daily study streak counter. Include a focus mode that blocks the rest of the page. Plan the design and layout first, then build it.

title: Flashcard Study App
description: Create and study flashcards with flip animations, categories, and spaced repetition scoring.
vibePrompt: I want to build a flashcard study app. Users create decks of flashcards with a question on the front and answer on the back. Cards flip with a smooth animation on click. Include a shuffle mode, a 'know it / still learning' sorting system, and progress tracking showing how many cards you've mastered per deck. Plan the design and layout first, then build it.

title: GPA Calculator
description: Calculate your semester and cumulative GPA by entering courses, credits, and grades.
vibePrompt: I want to build a GPA calculator. Users add courses with the course name, credit hours, and letter grade. The app calculates the semester GPA and cumulative GPA, shows a summary table, and visualizes GPA trends across semesters as a line chart. Include a 'what if' mode to see how future grades would affect GPA. Plan the design and layout first, then build it.

title: Class Schedule Organizer
description: Build a weekly class schedule with color-coded courses, room numbers, and professor names.
vibePrompt: I want to build a class schedule organizer. Users add courses with name, time, days of the week, room number, and professor. The app shows a weekly timetable grid with color-coded course blocks, handles time conflicts with warnings, and can switch between week and list views. Include an export feature for printing.
